_notes: Minimal Tier-1 floor: outbound network + privilege + core secrets + system-config commands all ASK (human approval, NOT hard-deny) so operators can manage schedulers and host process supervisors under approval and fresh-install bootstrap is not blocked. Only the classifier's catastrophic pattern floor (rm -rf /, mkfs, fork bomb, guard self-protection, ...) hard-denies. Installers are preset-controlled (allowed by default; Balanced/Strict escalate via signed approveTokens). Signed preset bundles tighten this via deny/approveTokens.
allowlistedDomainsNotes: Exact-match only. Use '*.example.com' to allow subdomains.
